case_title: CACV OF COLORADO LLC VS. BAZAIL A ALGAITHI

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO LLC HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ( AMOUNT $16,390.24 ) PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ALGAITHI, BAZAIL A $16,390.24 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $440.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,130.24, SEE SCANNED DOC (NO S.A.S.E., COPY IN 301 OUT BOX)
